description: Baseline: O(n²) find_all_match_locations via string prefix newline counting on every match

asi.hypothesis: Baseline measurement of current find_all_match_locations on 50k-line file with repeated matches

description: Replace O(n²) prefix newline counting with O(n) incremental tracking using prev_idx slice

asi.hypothesis: Track line numbers incrementally by counting newlines only between previous match and current match, instead of re-counting from string start every time
